query: 26th Franco-German Ministerial Council July 2026 defence security council outcomes agreements

{"query":"26th Franco-German Ministerial Council July 2026 defence security council outcomes agreements","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1262,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.elysee.fr/en/emmanuel-macron/2025/09/02/conclusions-of-the-franco-german-defence-and-security-council","title":"Conclusions of the Franco-German Defence and Security Counci","content":"Sep 2, 2025 — 22 June 2026 France and Germany have reached an agreement on the strategy and governance of KNDS. linked publication cover 2. 25 June 2026 ...Read more
In order to provide a complementary Early Warning system for Europe, France and Germany plan to launch a Franco-German Early Warning-Initiative with two pillars : a space-based missile early warning system based on ODIN’s EYE project and a network of ground-based radars, relying on existing and future technologies.
To formalize this initiative called JEWEL, that will be open to partners, a Letter of Intent will be prepared.
France and Germany will work to strengthen Ukraine's security and defence industry and promote industrial cooperation.
Recognizing the increasing importance of the Black Sea region for peace, security and prosperity in Europe, France and Germany will consider additional joint activities, e.g. in the fields of security, economy and connectivity, also with a view to contributing to the EU’s Black Sea Strategy in close cooperation with partners and allies."},{"url":"https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/meetings/fac/2026/07/13/","title":"Foreign Affairs Council - Consilium","content":"5 days ago — The Council launched the EU Partnership Mission in Armenia the Common Security and Defence Policy (CSDP) to enhance the country's resilience.
One year following the launch of the Black Sea strategic approach, the Council reviewed its implementation and discussed proposals for the way forward.
The Council further exchanged views on Gaza and the West Bank.
Ministers welcomed the framework agreement on ending the hostilities between Israel and Lebanon, while raising concerns for the fragile situation on the ground.
Under current affairs, the Council exchanged views on EU-UN relations, in view of the UN General Affairs high-level week (22-28 September 2026).
Last review: 13 July 2026"},{"url":"https://www.france24.com/en/tv-shows/spotlight/20260610-end-of-fcas-flagship-project-marks-setback-for-franco-german-cooperation-and-european-defense","title":"End of FCAS 'flagship project' marks setback for Franco-German cooperation and European defence - Spotlight - France 24","content":"According to Franke, the demise of the Franco-German FCAS fighter jet project was "not a surprise to anybody"."},{"url":"https://ieu-monitoring.com/editorial/main-results-of-the-eu-foreign-affairs-and-defence-council-on-12-may-2026/1215928","title":"Main results of the EU Foreign Affairs and Defence Council on 12 May 2026 – INSIGHT EU MONITORING","content":"May 13, 2026 Defence readiness, EU Defence Council, EU defence industry, European Defence Agency, European Peace Facility, Kaja Kallas, Operation ASPIDES, Russia–Ukraine war, Strait of Hormuz, Ukraine
At the beginning of their meeting, EU defence ministers received a presentation on the outcomes of the updated comprehensive EU Threat Analysis.
Over a working lunch, the Council discussed EU military support to Ukraine,against the background of the latest developments on the ground and ongoing diplomatic efforts to reach a just and lasting peace backed by robust security guarantees.
The Council exchanged views on the situation in the Middle East and its implications for European defence and security, including threats and challenges, current availability of core defence capabilities, and impact on Russia’s war of aggression against Ukraine.
The Council adopted an assistance measure worth €15 million under the European Peace Facility with the objective of strengthening the military and defence capabilities of the Armed Forces of Bosnia and Herzegovina.
The discussion followed the conclusions of the European Council in October 2025 and March 2026, which called for a reinforced role for the EDA in European defence capability development, collaborative research, and joint acquisition efforts."},{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/business/aerospace-defense/franco-german-defence-cooperation-under-strain-macron-merz-meet-2026-07-16/","title":"Franco-German defence cooperation under strain as ...","date":"1 day ago","content":"1 day ago — France and Germany will discuss deepening cooperation on nuclear ‌deterrence, missile defence, long-range strike capabilities and space at a ..."}]}
